name: Perceptive Capital Solutions Corp
business: Perceptive Capital Solutions Corp is a blank check company incorporated as a Cayman Islands exempted company for the purpose of effecting a business combination with one or more businesses. As of December 31, 2025, it had not commenced any operations and generated no operating revenues. The company focuses on acquiring businesses in the healthcare industry, specifically life sciences and medical technology sectors in North America and Europe.

exposures.sentence: In particular, we are targeting North American or European companies in the life sciences and medical technology sectors where our management has extensive investment experience.
In particular, we are targeting North American or European companies in the life sciences and medical technology sectors where our management has extensive investment experience.

On December 5, 2025, we, StarNet Merger Sub I, Corp., a Delaware corporation and our wholly-owned subsidiary (Merger Sub I), StarNet Merger Sub II, LLC, a Delaware limited liability company and our wholly-owned subsidiary (Merger Sub II), and Freenome Holdings, Inc., a Delaware corporation (Freenome), entered into a Business Combination Agreement...

catalysts.event: Proposed business combination with Freenome Holdings, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: The Proposed Freenome Business Combination is expected to close in the first half of 2026, following the receipt of the requisite approvals of the Company shareholders and Freenome stockholders and the fulfillment of other customary closing conditions.

tamClaims.claim: U.S. national health expenditures were approximately $5.3 trillion in 2024, accounting for about 18% of U.S. GDP.
tamClaims.sentence: According to the Center for Medicare and Medicaid Services, in 2024 total U.S national health expenditures represented approximately $5.3 trillion, accounting for approximately 18% of total U.S Gross Domestic Product.
